Klasse UpdateManager

java.lang.Object
ch.framedev.lagersystem.managers.UpdateManager
public class UpdateManager extends Object
Manages application updates by checking GitHub releases. Features: - Checks for new versions from GitHub releases - Compares version strings intelligently - Supports authenticated requests for higher rate limits - Provides JAR download URLs - Thread-safe singleton pattern

    UpdateManager.ChannelUpdateResult
    Result of checking all release channels
    static enum 
    UpdateManager.ReleaseChannel
    Enum representing different release channels/branches
    static final record 
    UpdateManager.ReleaseInfo
    Container class for release information.
    static final record 
    UpdateManager.VersionComparisonResult
    Result of version comparison

    Von Klasse geerbte Methoden Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Methodendetails

    • getInstance

      public static UpdateManager getInstance()
      Thread-safe singleton instance retrieval

    • setPersonalToken

      public void setPersonalToken(String token)
      Sets the GitHub personal token for authenticated requests. This allows for higher rate limits (5,000 requests/hour vs 60 requests/hour).
      Parameter:
      token - GitHub personal access token (e.g., "ghp_xxxxxxxxxxxx")

    • getLatestVersion

      public String getLatestVersion()
      Gets the latest version from GitHub releases. Uses caching to avoid excessive API calls (5-minute cache).
      Gibt zurück:
      Latest version string (e.g., "v1.0.0") or null if unable to fetch

    • getLatestVersion

      public String getLatestVersion(UpdateManager.ReleaseChannel channel)
      Gets the latest version for a specific release channel. Uses caching to avoid excessive API calls (5-minute cache).
      Parameter:
      channel - The release channel to check (STABLE, BETA, or ALPHA)
      Gibt zurück:
      Latest version string for the channel (e.g., "v1.0.0", "v1.0.0-beta.1") or null if unable to fetch

    • verifyRepository

      public boolean verifyRepository()
      Verifies that the repository exists and is accessible. Returns true if the repository is public and accessible.

    • clearCache

      public void clearCache()
      Clears the cached version information. Forces the next call to getLatestVersion() to fetch fresh data from GitHub.

    • getLatestReleaseNotes

      public String getLatestReleaseNotes()
      Gets the release notes for the latest version.
      Gibt zurück:
      Release notes as a string, or null if unable to fetch

    • getLatestReleaseInfo

      public UpdateManager.ReleaseInfo getLatestReleaseInfo()
      Gets detailed information about the latest release.
      Gibt zurück:
      ReleaseInfo object with version, notes, and download URL, or null if unable to fetch

    • isUpdateAvailable

      public boolean isUpdateAvailable()
      Checks if a newer version is available compared to the current version. Uses Main.VERSION as the current version.
      Gibt zurück:
      true if a newer version is available, false otherwise

    • isUpdateAvailable

      public boolean isUpdateAvailable(String currentVersion)
      Checks if a newer version is available compared to the specified version.
      Parameter:
      currentVersion - The current application version (e.g., "0.1-TESTING" or "v1.0.0")
      Gibt zurück:
      true if a newer version is available, false otherwise

    • detectChannel

      public static UpdateManager.ReleaseChannel detectChannel(String version)
      Detects the release channel from a version string.
      Parameter:
      version - Version string (e.g., "v1.0.0", "v1.0.0-beta.1", "0.2-TESTING")
      Gibt zurück:
      Detected ReleaseChannel

    • checkAllChannels

      public UpdateManager.ChannelUpdateResult checkAllChannels()
      Checks for updates in all channels and returns the best available update.
      Gibt zurück:
      ChannelUpdateResult with information about all available updates

    • compareWithLatest

      public UpdateManager.VersionComparisonResult compareWithLatest()
      Gets a detailed comparison between the current version and the latest version.
      Gibt zurück:
      A VersionComparisonResult with details, or null if unable to fetch latest version

    • getLatestReleaseJarUrl

      public String getLatestReleaseJarUrl()
      Gets the download URL for the latest release JAR file. Returns the direct download link to the first attached JAR file.
      Gibt zurück:
      Download URL if JAR file is attached to release, null otherwise

    • testVersionComparison

      public int testVersionComparison(String v1, String v2)
      Test method to verify version comparison logic. Logs comparison results for debugging purposes.
      Parameter:
      v1 - First version string
      v2 - Second version string
      Gibt zurück:
      Negative or positive integer based on comparison, 0 if equal
